title: 2 years to build my profitable model. Check out what I have to say.
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
I'll be honest. My first model was a mess. Overcomplicated, over-optimized, looked incredible in backtests and fell apart in week one of live trading. I was convinced I was building something smart. I was just building something that just memorized the past.

That mistake cost me months and my hard saved real money.

The thing nobody tells you starting out- complexity feels like progress. You keep adding indicators, layering logic, tweaking parameters. Every change feels productive. But you're just digging a deeper hole. Not developing a real and profitable edge.

The version of my model that actually became profitable is really simpler than anything I built in year one. Almost embarrassingly simple but it is far far profitable and also it beats almost every asset returns out there.

And then there's the psychology side which honestly hit harder than any technical mistake.

Sitting in cash when the market is moving feels physically uncomfortable. Watching a drawdown in real time with real money on the line - I nearly shut everything down. Twice. The model was doing exactly what it was supposed to. I just couldn't handle it emotionally. But if I had trusted the system the drawdown could have recovered in the very next streak of trade. But I did not had the trust to believe my system so I intervened almost in every drawdown when I was live testing it.

That's where most people quit. Not because their strategy failed. Because they couldn't get out of their own way.

6 months live now. Profitable through a brutal market stretch. The edge wasn't only the algorithm the I build but also being able to leave it alone and trusting it. 



If you're just starting - simplify everything and prepare for the psychological ride more than the technical one. That part will surprise you.

But also when you will successfully develop your profitable model after countless iterations and failures, you will say "it's worth it.".

  
(Also my model is based on Machine Learning and it is on BTC; my model beats BTC returns and is tested on 6 years of BTC past data and it has performed extremely well and also it is surviving the current BTC fall and beating spot. UP by \~40% in 6 months when BTC is down by around \~45%)

comments.author: poltudemon
comments.body: Any plans to productionize your model?

replies.author: poltudemon
replies.body: I mean for general public with paid subscriptions?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
Yes......

I am planning to open a subscription plan system.
Coding the website now.

Soon will launch it.

replies.author: poltudemon
replies.body: Great man! Let me know when it’s ready, if you want we can collaborate on this too no strings attached

replies.author: poltudemon
replies.body: Dropped DM please check, one question through why not create a paid telegram group for the initial product market fit evaluation

replies.author: Pokeasss
replies.body: Your alpha will decay as fast as you dilute the usage.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I don't think so.
Because my model is on a higher time frame. So unless the model will trade a billion dollars, it won't decay. 

I meant unless price reacts to execution by all users at a certain time.

I think I am good till 1000 active users.

comments.author: ukSurreyGuy
comments.body:
Congrats & Nice you created a trading bot using ML.

you talk of 6mths forward testing on BTC (Profit +40% & BTC Baseline -45%) & 6years back testing

what's the EXPECTANCY VALUE & PROFIT please

any links to share curves or other data on performance?

does it trade anything other than BTC?

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
so this is the report of my model tested on data back from 2022 (later tested from 2020, not included though) - [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive_link)

I haven't tested it on other crypto currency.

I believe each asset has its own characteristics, so a model developed on one asset could not work perfectly on another asset.

So for a different asset I have to use a different model or train it separtely on that asset data.

comments.author: country_roads_trader
comments.body:
Absolutely on same page with u, cant get out myself.

Almost 5 months on live with my own algo on xauusd. Accnt wud have done easily 4x.. but me being there, closing good ones early, taking manual in between - its 2.5x after long sleepless nights. When it shud have been full auto. 

This sucks honestly

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: That's the most important factor to maintain.

comments.author: Low-Independence5612
comments.body:
Hi OP.
Can you tell your educational background, as in are you an engineer or have you been coding since long??
I have been trading since a long time manually and want to create such a system for my own style. So just wanted to know how long will it take to get a grasp of these concepts and start building.
Will the new AI tools like Claude help someone like me who is a non coder but has a profitable market experience for multiple years??

Thanks in advance.

replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body:
I am not from an engineering background.

I learned coding myself from YouTube, Papers and Books, all myself. 

I have been doing this for 2 years now.

You just have to be clear of the concepts and how everything would work and the llms will hardcode for you.

comments.author: LittleScientistX
comments.body: Are you owner of AlgoFruit ? Platform
